creator: sakaue.mamoru@mwghennndo.com
text:
Created attachment 150566
add libreoffice-* to CONFLICTS_BUILD

It fails to build editors/openoffice-4 when libreoffice-* is installed because of an incorrect call of unopkg due to an incorrect priority in path search during build. It was not easy for me to give a fundamental solution because its calling process was not simple. I will suggest to add libreoffice-* to CONFLICTS_BUILD until a fundamental solution comes.
